title: Mutant More - Jungle Zombie to Nemesis
description: Changes the look of the mutant jungle zombie from Mutant More mod to look like Nemesis from Resident Evil.
body:
Description
This is a personal project i made for a modpack im playing with other people, its not super well made but i was happy enough with it that i thought i might share it. If your zombie apocalypse modpack needs a boss, and you want it to fit in with the tzp texture pack. feel free to use it.

it requires the Mutant More mod
